errors.scheduleOverlapsWithSession: The schedule overlaps with the following sessions: {{ sessions }}
errors.sessionOverlapsWithSession: The session overlaps with the following sessions: {{ sessions }}

generic.betaWarning: This feature is currently in beta. Bugs and breaking changes may occur. Please report any issues on: https://github.com/ls1intum/Artemis/issues

tutorialGroup.title: Title
tutorialGroup.channelReverse: Channel of the tutorial group {{ title }}
tutorialGroup.utilizationHelp: Average attendance divided by capacity (if defined). The average attendance considers the last three sessions. If no attendance is entered, the corresponding session is ignored and the calculation is performed with two or one session.

dateInput.label: Date
dateInput.invalidEndDateError: The end date of the tutorial free period needs to be after the start date!

reasonInput.label: Reason for no sessions on this day
reasonInput.maxLengthValidationError: Reason is limited to {{ max }} characters!

timeZoneInput.label: Tutorial Group Time Zone
timeZoneInput.changeWarning: You have changed the time zone. All individually created sessions and tutorial free days will be deleted. Only scheduled sessions will be recreated in the new time zone. Are you absolutely sure you want to do this?
timeZoneInput.explanation: The time zone in which the tutorial groups occur. This will be used to interpret the start and end times of the tutorial groups. You can search for a time zone by typing into the field.

periodInput.label: Tutorial Group Period
periodInput.explanation: The period in which the tutorial groups occur in the semester. This will the default schedule of every tutorial group. It can be overridden by individual schedules. For example, if you enter '01-01-2020 - 01-06-2020' here, all tutorial groups will have a default schedule from '01-01-2020 - 01-06-2020' by default. You can change this later for individual tutorial groups.
periodInput.requiredValidationError: You need to select a period!
periodInput.parseError: Period must be in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD - YYYY-MM-DD'
periodInput.invalidRangeError: Period must be a valid date range

useTutorialGroupChannelsInput.label: Use Artemis managed Tutorial Group Channels
useTutorialGroupChannelsInput.channelDeletionWarning: You have disabled the use of Artemis managed tutorial group channels. All channels that were created by Artemis will be deleted. Are you sure you want to do this?
useTutorialGroupChannelsInput.explanation: If enabled, Artemis will create a dedicated channel for each tutorial group in the 'Communication' section of the course. The channel can still be managed manually, but Artemis automatically performs some common management tasks. Artemis will automatically add and remove students from the channel when they register or unregister for the tutorial group. The assigned tutor of the tutorial group will be made a moderator of the channel. The channel will be deleted when the tutorial group is deleted. It can not be deleted manually. This option can be changed later.

tutorialGroupsManagement.intro: Welcome to the tutorial group management page! A beta feature of Artemis that allows you to manage online and offline weekly tutorial groups. Start by either importing tutorial groups from a CSV file or by creating a new tutorial group manually.
tutorialGroupsManagement.title: Tutorial Groups Management

deleteDialog.question: Are you sure to delete the Tutorial Group with title {{ title }}?
deleteDialog.confirm: Please enter the title of the tutorial group to confirm.

checklist.title: Tutorial Group Checklist
checklist.explanation: Before you can start using the tutorial groups feature, you must perform some configuration steps
checklist.timeZone: The course has a time zone configured
checklist.timeZoneExplanation: The course needs a time zone configured so that the tutorial groups can be scheduled correctly according to that time zone.
checklist.configurationExplanation: The course needs a course wide configuration for the tutorial groups. This configuration contains default settings for all tutorial groups.
checklist.configuration: The course has a tutorial group configuration

confirmationDialogue.message: Do you really want to remove this student from registrations?

importModal.explanationText: This dialog can be used to register existing users through a .csv file. Each entry in the file must contain a value for either login or registration number. If the file contains more then the required columns, they will be discarded automatically. Here an example for a valid .csv file:
importModal.invalidFileEntriesAlert: The chosen file contains entries that do not have at least one of the required fields.
importModal.noFileEntriesAlert: The chosen file contains no entries.
importModal.confirmationText: Please have a look at the contents of the parsed .csv file and confirm their correctness. After your confirmation, Artemis will verify that the users exists and register them for the group. Artemis parsed the following:
importModal.importErrorAlert: Something went wrong while importing the students. Please try again.

resultsDescription.someStudentsRegistered: Only a subset of students could be registered. The logins/registration numbers highlighted in red could not be matched to any existing users:
resultsDescription.noStudentsRegistered: No students could be registered. The given logins/registration numbers could not be matched to existing users:

registerModal.registerErrorAlert: Something went wrong while registering the students. Please try again.

registerSearchBar.fetchSuggestionsError: An error occured while loading search results. Please try again.

validationError.titleContent: Title must start with a letter or digit, and can otherwise only contain letters, digits, colons, spaces and dashes.
validationError.titleLength: Title must contain at most 19 characters. The system automatically removes leading/trailing whitespaces.
validationError.campusLength: Campus must contain at most 255 characters. The system automatically removes leading/trailing whitespaces.
validationError.languageLength: Language must contain at most 255 characters. The system automatically removes leading/trailing whitespaces.
validationError.additionalInformationLength: Additional information must contain at most 255 characters. The system automatically removes leading/trailing whitespaces.
validationError.firstSessionEndNotAfterStart: The end of the first session must be after its start.
validationError.firstSessionEndNotOnSameDayAsStart: The end of the first session must be on the same day as its start.
validationError.teachingPeriodNotAfterFirstSessionStart: The end of the teaching period must be after the first session's start.
validationError.teachingPeriodMoreThanTwoYearsAfterFirst: The end of the teaching period must be at most 2 years after the first session's start.
validationError.teachingPeriodNotAfterFirstSessionEnd: The end of the teaching period must be after the first session's end.
validationError.locationLength: Location must contain at most 255 characters. The system automatically removes leading/trailing whitespaces.
